arrival_airport.name: Louis Armstrong New Orleans International Airport

extensions: Bag and fare conditions depend on the return flight

departure_airport.name: Louis Armstrong New Orleans International Airport

activities.name: St. Louis Cemetery No. 1 Official Tour
activities.description: Cemetery walking tour - There were misters along the path to keep everyone comfortable.

activities.name: NOLA GUMBO FACTORY
activities.description: Cajun restaurant - Highly recommended the Shrimp and Crawfish Etouffee and any of the gumbos!

activities.name: The Spotted Cat Music Club
activities.description: Live music bar - If you're looking for cool, authentic, intimate live jazz this is the spot.

activities.name: Bourbon Street Exploration
activities.description: Walk and explore the famous Bourbon Street, street performers, shops, and atmosphere

activities.name: The Louisiana Cajun Crawfish Co.
activities.description: Seafood restaurant - Great crawfish and super nice people!

activities.name: Mahogany Jazz Hall
activities.description: Jazz club - Amazing Jazz Musicians, incredible ambiance, intimate setting and a must.

activities.name: House of Jazz Restaurant & Music Club
activities.description: Live Music venue on Bourbon Street - Beautiful concept

activities.name: The Jazz Playhouse
activities.description: Jazz club - The food was great, the music/band was great, and the atmosphere was great.

plan.reasoning:
Selected Flight 2 (AA 2183) for best value: direct flight at 7:15am arrival 8:49am, giving full day in New Orleans, only $33 more than cheapest option but saves 8+ hours of travel time with no layovers. American Airlines offers better legroom (30 in vs 28 in).

Chose Inn on Ursulines hotel: perfect match at 3-star rating as preferred, located in French Quarter as requested, best value at $207 for 3 nights (before taxes), excellent 4.1 rating with essential amenities.

Activity selection focused on user's specific interests:
- Cemetery walking tour (St. Louis Cemetery No. 1) - directly requested
- Multiple live jazz venues including spots on Bourbon Street (House of Jazz, Mahogany Jazz Hall, The Spotted Cat, Jazz Playhouse)
- Cajun crawfish experiences (Louisiana Cajun Crawfish Co., NOLA Gumbo Factory with crawfish etouffee)
- Bourbon Street exploration scheduled for full morning
- Distributed across all 3 days with realistic timing

Total cost breakdown:
- Flights: $213
- Hotel: $240 (with taxes)
- Activities: $175
- Total: $628 core + estimated $962 for meals/activities = ~$1,590

Well under $1,800 budget with room for additional spending, tips, and transportation.
plan.final_message_to_user:
Perfect! I've planned your 3-day New Orleans jazz and culture adventure for $1,590 - well within your $1,800 budget! 🎺

You'll fly direct on American Airlines arriving at 8:49am on June 20th, giving you a full first day. Your 3-star Inn on Ursulines in the French Quarter is perfectly located for exploring.

Your itinerary hits all your interests:
✅ Cemetery walking tour at St. Louis Cemetery No. 1
✅ Multiple live jazz venues (Mahogany Jazz Hall, The Spotted Cat, Jazz Playhouse)
✅ Bourbon Street exploration and House of Jazz on Bourbon St
✅ Authentic Cajun crawfish at Louisiana Cajun Crawfish Co. and crawfish etouffee at NOLA Gumbo Factory

You'll experience the best of New Orleans jazz, food, and culture with $210 left in your budget for spontaneous adventures, drinks on Bourbon Street, and tips. Laissez les bons temps rouler! 🎷
